settings.heading: Wear Something That Means Something
settings.subheading: Instant digital downloads — buy, download, create.

settings.heading: Designs Made with Heart. Yours Instantly.
settings.body:
Every design starts with an idea and ends up yours instantly — no waiting, no shipping, just a file ready to create with. We pour heart into every graphic so you don't have to start from scratch.

Founded by Shay, PrintsByShay is built on the belief that great design should be accessible, affordable, and yours the moment you pay for it.

settings.heading: Stay in the Loop
settings.subtext: New designs, restocks, and deals — straight to your inbox.
